references.name: Web Production Pipeline
references.description: Static viewer pipeline: Markdown → fetch → client-side rendering. 4-theme system, Liquid resolver, .nojekyll deployment.

references.name: Web Pagination & Export
references.description: CSS Paged Media print stack. @page zones, running headers/footers, PDF export via window.print(). DOCX via MSO elements. Zero-dependency.

references.name: Web Page Visualization
references.description: Local rendering pipeline: Playwright + Chromium + npm mermaid. Screenshots, Mermaid-to-image, webcard generation. Self-contained.

references.name: Documentation Generation
references.description: Publication lifecycle, source structure, diagram integration, writing style, three-tier structure, quality checklist, front matter contract.

references.name: Webcard Generation
references.description: Animated OG social preview GIFs. 1200x630, dual-theme, animation types, naming conventions, live webcard alternative.

references.name: Interactive Documentation
references.description: Session workflow for creating publications interactively. Phase pattern: gather → structure → expand → web pages → deliver.

references.name: Documentation Audience
references.description: 19-segment audience definition across 5 tiers. Content voice guidelines. Rewrite principle for outward-facing content.

conventions.docs_directory: Required at project root when documentation module is active
conventions.front_matter: YAML front matter is the metadata contract (title, description, permalink, og_image)
conventions.three_tier_publication: Source (markdown pur), Summary (web condensé), Full (web complet)
conventions.doc_header: Nav-back + actual page link + version tag, collapsible metadata (Publication/Generated/Authors). Shared buildDocHeaderParts() for both standalone and embed chrome bar.
conventions.export_pdf: Corporate styling: white bg, blue accent (#1d4ed8), cover page centered, TOC page 2, running header/footer with blue liners, CSS @page three-zone layout.
conventions.export_docx: Same corporate styling as PDF: cover page centered, TOC page 2, MSO running header/footer with blue liners, Calibri 10pt, page-break-before on h2 #2+.
conventions.panel_dividers: Draggable + click-to-step vertical dividers in main navigator. 14px desktop, 8px mobile responsive. Grip dots, no arrows. Pixel-based grid-template-columns.
conventions.site_safe_urls: No hardcoded domain URLs in markdown source. Web links use {{ site.baseurl }}/ Liquid tags resolved at render time. Export links use viewer URL format (index.html?doc=).
conventions.bilingual_en_fr: All documentation always in both EN and FR. EN at docs/publications/<slug>/, FR at docs/fr/publications/<slug>/. Front matter cross-links via permalink_fr (EN) and permalink_en (FR). Never create one without the other.
